existing_features.title: Update all instances of the team/brand name text labels across the frontend so they are displayed as three separate styled elements: 'Legend', 'X', and 'Arena' — each word on its own line or as a distinct styled segment, consistent with the esports visual theme.

new_feature_requests.summary: Fully revert the entire frontend to its Version 44 state — restore all component styles, animations, CSS custom properties, Tailwind configuration, and layout settings exactly as they were in Version 44, undoing any changes introduced in Version 45 or Version 46.
Update text labels to display as: 'Legend', 'X', 'Arena' (styled/written in a specific way as requested by the user).
